title: Combat Reforged
description: *This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".* This Resource Pack changes the weapons and armors of the game to be more consistent and good looking.
body:
This Resource Pack changes the weapons and armors of the game to be more consistent and good looking.

[**REQUIRES OPTIFINE**](https://optifine.net/downloads)

----

All the weapons now have a unique 3d model and all armor have new unique textures

----

{**This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".**}

If you want to support me:
